overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's dense urban center. The player descends from a rooftop to street level and walks through a neon-lit canyon of skyscrapers, crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles and massive holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated maintenance walkway between industrial buildings

events.description: player jumps down from rooftop walkway to street level below

agents.ego_description: moving along a narrow elevated walkway between green industrial walls then jumping down to the street level

entered.detail: tall green metal industrial wall with pipes and ventilation grates
black metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
vertical glowing purple neon light strips mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow elevated walkway between industrial buildings with green metal walls. The player moves forward along the concrete path bordered by a metal railing, then jumps down to the street level below, landing near concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban street canyon with blue median barriers and overhead walkways

events.description: landing on street level and transitioning from elevated walkway to street canyon environment
futuristic black sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a bright blue median barrier, passing concrete planters and street furniture

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving past the player heading away down the street

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter containing small palm trees
bright blue painted concrete divider with black and yellow metal railings
large vertical billboard with red background displaying health warning text
enclosed glass and metal walkway connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: Having landed at street level, the player walks along a dense urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides. A bright blue median barrier runs along the right side while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left. Large billboards and an overhead pedestrian bridge dominate the vertical space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching major intersection with dense neon advertising

events.description: passing distinctive red-leaved trees lining the sidewalk approach to the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward a large intersection, passing various storefronts and advertisements while approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white car approaching the intersection in the distance

entered.detail: distinctive tree with crimson red foliage planted in a concrete planter
large billboard with purple neon text reading WET DREAM
red illuminated sign reading Crescent on the building facade
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection marked by distinctive red-leaved trees and increasingly dense advertising. The street remains enclosed by tall buildings featuring prominent billboards including one for Crescent and another with purple neon text. Yellow crosswalk lines become visible as the intersection nears.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with multi-directional traffic and towering holographic advertisements

events.description: entering the wide open intersection from the narrow street canyon, revealing full sky view
turning right to look at the Crescent building facade while continuing to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking around at the surrounding skyscrapers, turning to examine the Crescent building

notable_agents.action: tan sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner near the Crescent building

entered.detail: massive building with reflective teal glass facade and multiple levels
large floating holographic display showing animated colorful content
tall pole with multiple traffic signals and street signs

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide sunlit intersection from the narrow street canyon, revealing towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements. While crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, the camera turns to examine the Crescent building's detailed facade as vehicles pass through the intersection and pedestrians wait at the corners.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a narrow industrial walkway into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic urban intersection. It begins on an elevated concrete path between green metal walls before the camera jumps down to street level, landing beside heavy concrete barriers. As the movement continues, the scene shifts into a dense urban canyon where towering buildings and a bright blue median barrier frame a flow of futuristic vehicles. The environment then opens up as the camera approaches a major intersection marked by red-leaved trees and purple neon billboards, moving past yellow crosswalk lines. Finally, the narrow street expands into a wide, sunlit plaza dominated by glass skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements, with the camera turning to examine the detailed facade of the Crescent building.
